# Scrape Creators API Documentation

> Official API documentation for Scrape Creators - the easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ other platforms.

> **Important:** Each endpoint link below points to its full documentation page with parameters, response schemas, and code examples. Always visit the endpoint's documentation page before writing any integration code.

> OpenAPI spec: https://docs.scrapecreators.com/openapi.json

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/introduction): Overview of the Scrape Creators API, authentication, and quickstart guide.
- **Base URL:** `https://api.scrapecreators.com`
- **Authentication:** Pass your API key via the `x-api-key` header.

## TikTok API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/profile): Scrapes a public TikTok profile.
- [User's Audience Demographics](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/user/audience): Get the audience demographics of a TikTok user including audience countries.
- [Profile Videos](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v3/tiktok/profile/videos): Scrapes videos from a TikTok profile with cursor-based pagination.
- [Video Info](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v2/tiktok/video): Scrapes data from a TikTok video.
- [Transcript](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/video/transcript): Scrapes transcript from a TikTok video.
- [TikTok Live](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/user/live): Scrapes a TikTok user's live stream.
- [Comments](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/video/comments): Scrapes comments from a TikTok video.
- [Following](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/user/following): Scrapes accounts that a TikTok user follows.
- [Followers](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/user/followers): Scrapes followers of a TikTok account.
- [Search Users](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/search/users): Scrapes TikTok users matching a search query.
- [Search by Hashtag](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/search/hashtag): Scrapes TikTok videos by hashtag.
- [Search by Keyword](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/search/keyword): Scrapes TikTok videos matching a keyword.
- [Top Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/search/top): Search TikTok's 'Top' tab for photo carousels and videos.
- [Get Popular Songs](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/songs/popular): Get popular songs from TikTok.
- [Get Popular Creators](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/creators/popular): Get popular creators from TikTok with filtering by follower count and country.
- [Get Popular Videos](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/videos/popular): Get popular videos from TikTok with filtering by time period and country.
- [Get Popular Hashtags](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/hashtags/popular): Get popular hashtags from TikTok with filtering by time period and country.
- [Get Song Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/song): Get details about a TikTok song.
- [TikToks Using Song](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/song/videos): Get the TikToks using a song.
- [Trending Feed](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/get-trending-feed): Get the trending feed from TikTok.

## TikTok Shop API

- [Shop Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/shop/search): Scrape TikTok Shop products from a search.
- [Shop Products](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/shop/products): Get the products from a TikTok Shop.
- [Product Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/tiktok/product): Get the details of a TikTok Shop product including stock and related videos.

## Instagram API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/profile): Gets public Instagram profile data, recent posts, and related accounts.
- [Basic Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/basic-profile): Get a basic profile by user id.
- [Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v2/instagram/user/posts): Get a public profile's public posts.
- [Post/Reel Info](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/post): Retrieve public post or reel details.
- [Transcript](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v2/instagram/media/transcript): Get the transcript of an Instagram post or reel using AI.
- [Search Reels](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v2/instagram/reels/search): Search for reels by keyword.
- [Comments](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v2/instagram/post/comments): Get comments from an Instagram post or reel.
- [Reels](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/user/reels): Get all public reels from a profile.
- [Story Highlights](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/user/highlights): Get story highlights from an Instagram user.
- [Highlights Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/user/highlight/detail): Get details about a specific highlight.
- [Reels Using Song](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/song/reels): Get reels using a song.
- [Embed HTML](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/instagram/user/embed): Get the HTML embed for a user's profile.

## YouTube API

- [Channel Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/channel): Get comprehensive channel information including stats and metadata.
- [Channel Videos](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/channel-videos): Get all videos from a channel with detailed information.
- [Channel Shorts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/channel/shorts): Get the shorts from a channel.
- [Video/Short Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/video): Get complete information about a video or short including transcript.
- [Transcript](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/video/transcript): Get transcript of a video or short.
- [Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/search): Search YouTube and get matching videos, channels, playlists, shorts, and lives.
- [Search by Hashtag](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/search/hashtag): Search YouTube by hashtag.
- [Comments](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/video/comments): Get comments from a YouTube video.
- [Trending Shorts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/shorts/trending): Get trending shorts from YouTube.
- [Playlist](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/playlist): Get the videos of a YouTube playlist.
- [Community Post Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/youtube/community-post): Get the details of a YouTube community post.

## LinkedIn API

- [Person's Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkedin/profile): Get a person's public LinkedIn profile including recent posts.
- [Company Page](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkedin/company): Get a LinkedIn company page.
- [Post](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkedin/post): Get a LinkedIn post or article.

## Facebook API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/profile): Get public Facebook profile information.
- [Profile Reels](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/profile/reels): Get a public Facebook page's reels.
- [Profile Photos](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/profile/photos): Get a public Facebook page's photos.
- [Profile Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/profile/posts): Get public Facebook profile posts.
- [Facebook Group Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/group/posts): Get a public Facebook group's posts.
- [Post](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/post): Get a public Facebook post or reel by URL.
- [Transcript](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/post/transcript): Get the transcript of a Facebook post or reel.
- [Comments](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/post/comments): Get the comments of a Facebook post or reel.

## Facebook Ad Library API

- [Ad Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/adLibrary/ad): Get details about a Facebook ad.
- [Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/adLibrary/search/ads): Search the Facebook (Meta) Ad Library by keyword.
- [Company Ads](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/adLibrary/company/ads): Get all the ads a company has running.
- [Search for Companies](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/facebook/adLibrary/search/companies): Search for companies by name and get their ad library page id.

## Google Ad Library API

- [Company Ads](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/google/company/ads): Get the public ads for a company from Google Ad Transparency Library.
- [Ad Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/google/ad): Get the details for a Google ad.
- [Advertiser Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/google/adLibrary/advertisers/search): Search the Google Ad Transparency Library for advertisers.

## LinkedIn Ad Library API

- [Search Ads](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkedin/ads/search): Search the LinkedIn Ad Library.
- [Ad Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkedin/ad): Get the details for a LinkedIn ad.

## Twitter API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitter/profile): Get Twitter profile information including stats and metadata.
- [User Tweets](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitter/user-tweets): Get tweets from a user's profile.
- [Tweet Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitter/tweet): Get detailed information about a specific tweet including engagement.
- [Transcript](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitter/tweet/transcript): Get the transcript of a video tweet.
- [Community](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitter/community): Get the details of a Twitter (X) Community.
- [Community Tweets](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitter/community/tweets): Get the tweets from a Twitter (X) Community.

## Reddit API

- [Subreddit Details](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/subreddit/details): Get details about a subreddit.
- [Subreddit Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/subreddit): Get recent posts from a subreddit with engagement metrics.
- [Subreddit Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/subreddit/search): Search within a subreddit for posts, comments, or media.
- [Post Comments](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/post/comments): Get comments and post information from a Reddit post.
- [Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/search): Search Reddit for posts.
- [Search Ads](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/ads/search): Search the Reddit Ad Library.
- [Get Ad](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/reddit/ad): Get a specific Reddit ad by id.

## Truth Social API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/truthsocial/profile): Get Truth Social profile info.
- [User Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/truthsocial/user/posts): Get Truth Social user posts.
- [Post](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/truthsocial/post): Get a Truth Social post.

## Threads API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/threads/profile): Get Threads profile info.
- [Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/threads/user/posts): Get Threads posts by user.
- [Post](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/threads/post): Get a Threads post by URL with comments and related posts.
- [Search Users](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/threads/search/users): Search for Threads users by username.

## Bluesky API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/bluesky/profile): Get Bluesky profile info.
- [Posts](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/bluesky/user/posts): Get Bluesky user posts.
- [Post](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/bluesky/post): Get a Bluesky post.

## Pinterest API

- [Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/pinterest/search): Search Pinterest.
- [Pin](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/pinterest/pin): Get a Pinterest pin.
- [User Boards](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/pinterest/user/boards): Get a user's Pinterest boards.
- [Board](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/pinterest/board): Get the pins of a Pinterest board.

## Google Search API

- [Search](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/google/search): Search Google and get results.

## Twitch API

- [Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitch/profile): Get Twitch profile information.
- [Clip](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/twitch/clip): Get Twitch clip details.

## Kick API

- [Clip](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/kick/clip): Get Kick clip details.

## Snapchat API

- [User Profile](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/snapchat/profile): Get Snapchat user profile information.

## Link-in-Bio APIs

- [Linktree](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linktree): Scrape a Linktree page.
- [Komi](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/komi): Scrape a Komi page.
- [Pillar](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/pillar): Scrape a Pillar page.
- [Linkbio](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkbio): Scrape a Linkbio (lnk.bio) page.
- [Linkme](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/linkme): Get Linkme profile info by URL.

## Amazon Shop API

- [Amazon Shop Page](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/amazon/shop): Get products and details from a creator's Amazon Shop page.

## Utility APIs

- [Get Age and Gender](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/detect-age-gender): Detect age and gender of a creator using AI analysis of profile image.
- [Get Credit Balance](https://docs.scrapecreators.com/v1/credit-balance): Check how many API credits you have remaining.
